entry.title: lissy93 commented on pull request lissy93/awesome-privacy#620
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/awesome-privacy#620 · June 14, 2026 19:50
lissy93 commented Jun 14, 2026
Pushback is on the "No KYC required" part, since https://skhron.com.ua/register.php does ask for full name, address, phone number, email, etc.
